rationale: In the citing paper, Xu, Jiang, and Dhar (2013) appears in a grouped parenthetical citation used to support a broad claim that mindsets can influence decision processes. The citation is not discussed individually, and its specific theory, mechanism, or findings are not used to develop hypotheses in this LEGO-creativity work. There is no visible borrowing of measures, design, or interpretation from that paper, so its function is background positioning rather than a substantive dependency.
